title: The Lonely Passion of Judith Hearne
original_title: The Lonely Passion of Judith Hearne
overview: A penniless middle-aged spinster scrapes by giving piano lessons in the Dublin of the 1950s. She makes a sad last bid for love with a fellow resident of her rundown boarding house, who imagines she has the money to bankroll the business he hopes to open.
